holdings.n: Invesco Short-Term Investments Trust Government & Agency Portfolio Institutional Class

holdings.infoBox: PWER is an equity ETF with a total of 35 individual holdings. The top holdings are Steel Dynamics stock at 7.14%, Hudbay Minerals at 6.39%, Ero Copper at 5.40%, First Solar at 4.63%, and Alcoa at 4.49%.

overview.description: The Nomura Energy Transition ETF (PWER) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in global companies across various sectors that facilitate transition to low carbon energy sources and lower emission power production. PWER was launched on Nov 28, 2023 and is issued by Nomura.
